aboutMe.title: About Me
aboutMe.subtitle: I'm a passionate coding student with a deep fascination for cybersecurity and modern web development. My journey into technology began with a curiosity about how we can make a piece of rock into a CPU that runs the world nowadays and how digital systems work, which evolved into a passion for building secure and easy-to-use applications. I currently plan to pursue a degree in Software Engineering, having completed a technical degree in Systems Analysis and Development. I spend my days mastering React and JavaScript, and exploring the intersection of development and security. I believe that great code isn't just functional—it's secure, accessible, and meaningful. When I'm not coding, you'll find me researching the latest cybersecurity trends, running bootcamps, and watching personal growth videos.
